## Summary

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` ‚Äî new feature
- [ ] `fix` ‚Äî bug fix
- [ ] `docs` ‚Äî documentation only
- [ ] `chore` ‚Äî tooling, dependencies, CI
- [ ] `refactor` ‚Äî code refactor without feature change
- [ ] `test` ‚Äî adding or fixing tests
- [ ] `perf` ‚Äî performance improvement

## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional Commit message used (`type(scope): description`)
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
- [ ] No new linter warnings
- [ ] Security-relevant changes include audit log entries
- [ ] CLA signed (first-time contributors only)
